_source: Curated from public JA3/JA4 malware fingerprint lists. JA3 entries sourced from abuse.ch SSLBL (https://sslbl.abuse.ch/blacklist/ja3_fingerprints.csv, accessed 2025-Q4). JA4 entries from FoxIO JA4+ Database (https://github.com/FoxIO-LLC/ja4, Apache-2.0). Sentinel entry (all-zeros) is for deterministic testing only.

entries.label: test-sig
entries._note: Sentinel: deterministic test entry; never appears in real traffic.

entries.label: Trickbot
entries._note: Trickbot C2 TLS fingerprint. Source: abuse.ch SSLBL.

entries.label: Cobalt-Strike
entries._note: Cobalt Strike beacon default TLS fingerprint. Source: abuse.ch SSLBL.

entries.label: AsyncRAT
entries._note: AsyncRAT default client TLS fingerprint. Source: abuse.ch SSLBL.

entries.label: Sliver-C2
entries._note: Sliver C2 framework default TLS fingerprint. Source: FoxIO JA4+ database.
